productDisplayName: Cabarelli Men Brown Accessory Gift Set
description: Gift set - Wallet, card holder and key chain Wondering what to give that special someone as a gift? Your search is over with this classy combination! Perfect gift set for the man of style. Sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside the jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out. Comes with a matching card holder and key chain Wallet Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 8.5 cm Textured leather upper with fabric lining Two-fold wallet Two main compartments Four card holders on the left fold and a buttonable coin pocket on the right One slip pocket on either side of the fold Key Chain Oval leather keychain with a clasp and a ring Card Holder Dimensions: 9.5 cm x 5.5. cm Rectangular card holder with an openable flap that has a magnetic closure Care Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
